docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOSTER, ROBIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WONG, EDMOND THE AGREEMENT REACHED BY THE PARTIES WHEREBY $100.00 WAS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF CONSTITUES A COMPROMISE AND RELEASE OF THE ISSUE BETWEEN THE PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY FOSTER, ROBIN AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, EDMOND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-25-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, EDMOND
